LanguageData.TribalSignal_CommandDesc: Raise a smoke signal. A random non-hostile Neolithic faction that can send trade caravans will be notified; the caravan arrives after a delay (not instantly). Requires {0} silver. Cooldown applies after calling.
LanguageData.TribalSignal_NoFaction: No suitable tribal faction is available (Neolithic, non-hostile, can trade, temperature OK).
LanguageData.TribalSignal_Burning: Signal fire burning. Caravan arriving in {0}.
LanguageData.TribalSignal_BurnedOut: The signal fire has burned out.
LanguageData.TribalSignal_ConfirmPayment: Calling a caravan requires paying {0} silver to the caravaneer upon arrival. Set aside this amount now?
LanguageData.TribalSignal_Failed: The signal failed — no caravan arrived (blocked conditions or RNG).
LanguageData.TribalSignal_Scheduled: Smoke signal sent to {0}. A trader caravan should arrive in about {1} days.
LanguageData.TribalSignal_CooldownShared: Cooldown is shared: all signal fires use the same timer.
